---
name: Feature request
about: A new indicator, adapter, reference standard, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

<!-- The task, not the implementation -- e.g. "ingest HL7v2 ORU messages",
not "add a parser class". -->

## Is this in scope for this skill?

Check `references/METHODOLOGY.md` and `SKILL.md`'s frontmatter first --
some things (prematurity correction, condition-specific charts, growth
velocity) are deliberately deferred, not missing by accident. If your
request is one of these, say so and make the case for why v2 should
pick it up.

## Would this need a new authoritative data source?

If yes (e.g. a new growth chart standard), note where the reference
data would come from -- see `references/DATA_SOURCES.md` for the bar
(checksummed, cited, traceable to an official publisher).
